channel.title: THE SIGNAL // dated tech calls
channel.description: A self-grading public oracle. Dated, falsifiable tech calls, graded in public.

item.description: Devs are starring DeusData/codebase-memory-mcp hard today. Betting it picks up a corporate backer or a managed-cloud offering within six months. // OPEN // LONGSHOT: WIN IF "DEUSDATA" RESURFACES BY 2026-07-18
